sheet_name: แบบขยายห้องน้ำ WC.1, WC.2
source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01_หน้า19.png
view_title: รูปตัดห้องน้ำ WC.1, WC.2 (มุม 2)

elements.description: Interior wall elevation from the opposite cut direction, showing a wall-mounted cabinet/mirror unit (2 hexagon '3' tags side by side at the top) above a counter, ceramic tile zone height 2.70m with breakdown 0.60(lower)+0.20+0.20+1.01(upper)+0.69(top band)
Two hexagon-'3'-tagged wall units side by side at the top of the elevation, above the LAV.1 counter — likely a mirrored medicine-cabinet pair, not independently labeled 'M.' here
Towel rail (TR.), right side of elevation
Counter-mounted wash basin (LAV.1), left-center of elevation
Bottom horizontal dimension chain: 1.55 + 0.45 (sub-groups), overall '0.10 | 2.00 | 0.10' = 2.20 total between gridD and gridC

warnings: This sheet (A-17) shows two interior wall elevations/sections of the WC.1/WC.2 bathroom, cut in different directions; this file covers view '2' (cut roughly perpendicular to view '1', between gridD and gridC). View '1' is in _หน้า19_wc_section1.json.
The 2.20m width dimension chain (0.10+2.00+0.10) is consistent with the gridD-gridC span noted in the plan sheet (_หน้า18_wc_plan.json).
